meta.title: Joel Langill On His New OT Security Training Class And More
meta.description: Join our livestream on LinkedIn and YouTube as I talk with Joel Langill about his new OT Security Training class. Based on past performance, I'm sure Joel and I will cover a variety of areas outside of this, agreeing and disagreeing. We will also take your questions and comments in this live event.
